backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for Urban Thekedaar backend, handling user profiles, query form submissions, and construction cost estimate calculations with role-based access control and data migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that transforms the old actor state (contacts map) into the new schema with queryForms list, calculatorLeads list, and preserved userProfiles map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (chatbot, query form, estimate calculator leads, admin panel) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, and style file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design token system (colors, radius, chart colors) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Urban Thekedaar' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages routing between the AdminPanel and the main site, handles smooth scroll navigation via section refs, and conditionally shows the ProfileSetup modal for newly authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: Renders the 'About Urban Thekedaar' section with a descriptive overview of the company and a grid of four principle cards (Live Project Tracking, Fair Pricing, On-Time Delivery, Build Quality) using Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/AdminInquiries.t: Displays all contact form submissions in a card list for admin users, with access control via useIsCallerAdmin and loading/error/empty states handled via skeletons and badges.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Provides a hardcoded-credential admin login screen and, upon authentication, a tabbed dashboard showing query forms and calculator leads fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/Chatbot.tsx: Implements a floating chatbot widget with keyword-based auto-responses and a tabbed dialog containing a live chat interface and a query submission form backed by useSubmitQueryForm.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Renders a 'Get In Touch' section with contact info cards (phone, email, address) and a validated contact form that submits data via useSubmitContactForm with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/EstimateCalculat: A form component that collects user contact info and project details (type, area, floors, quality tier, address) to calculate a construction cost estimate via a mutation hook, displaying the result in INR currency format.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying copyright year, contact info, and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A fixed navigation header with a construction-themed logo, scroll-aware styling, desktop/mobile nav links, and a login button; conditionally shows an 'Inquiries' link for authenticated admins.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: A full-screen hero section with a responsive background image, tagline, and two CTA buttons navigating to the calculator and contact sections.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, showing loading state during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Process.tsx: A section component displaying the four-step construction process (Site Assessment, Planning, Execution, Handover) as cards with icons and connecting arrows.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email, saving the profile via a mutation hook before closing.
frontend/src/components/WhyUs.tsx: React section component that displays a grid of six feature cards explaining Urban Thekedaar's value propositions, plus a 'Our Promise' banner at the bottom.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, contact/query form submissions, calculator leads, and cost estimate mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining warm earth-tone CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes suited to a construction industry brand.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), fonts, border radii, animations, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Urban Thekedaar website project, including architectural notes, existing implemented features (chatbot, query form, calculator leads, admin panel), and pending feature requests with their requirement IDs and statuses.
